metadata.description: Rotates vectors in 3D space - achievable with rotation matrices

summary: Rotates a 3D vector around axis by angle. Requires rotation matrix math or custom HLSL function.

rotation_modes.Euler: Rotation by X, Y, Z angles separately
rotation_modes.Axis: Rotate around arbitrary axis by angle

implementation: Custom HLSL function with rotation matrix multiplication
complexity: Requires knowledge of 3D rotation math or use pre-built functions
compatibility_loss_20_percent: Angle unit differences (degrees vs radians), rotation order conventions
typical_use: Direction vectors, normal rotation, spiral patterns, directional effects
